examples: Wild emmer is one of the important genetic resources for wheat breeding.
Several powdery mildew resistance genes derived from wild emmer accessions have been mapped on the short and long arms of chromosome 2B by SSR marker.
In this study, genetic analysis of a wild emmer wheat accession 21449 was carried out, and one recessive resistance gene in 21449 was mapped with microsatellite markers.
Emmer was known as a social conservative who opposed civil rights for gay and lesbian people and opposed immigration reform.
In 2010, Target Corp. came under intense fire after Minnesota campaign disclosure laws revealed that it had given a contribution on behalf of Republican gubernatorial candidate Tom Emmer.
